Journal.Title: Zhonghua lao dong wei sheng zhi ye bing za zhi = Zhonghua laodong weisheng zhiyebing zazhi = Chinese journal of industrial hygiene and occupational diseases
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Zhonghua Lao Dong Wei Sheng Zhi Ye Bing Za Zhi

Article.ArticleTitle: [A case of acute nitrogen poisoning caused by working in a confined space].

Abstract.AbstractText: Nitrogen, an inert gas, is widely used in industrial applications to prevent oxidation, corrosion, and explosions. However, it poses a risk of asphyxiation in enclosed or poorly ventilated environments. This article reports a case of acute nitrogen poisoning in a confined space. The patient was working inside a large-diameter pipeline when an unexpected leak in the connected nitrogen supply pipeline occurred, resulting in excessive inhalation of nitrogen and subsequent asphyxiation. The patient recovered after active treatment. Enterprises should enhance occupational safety and health training to raise workers' awareness of protective measures. Workers performing tasks in confined spaces must strictly adhere to operational protocols and implement proper safety precautions.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Zhonghua Lao Dong Wei Sheng Zhi Ye Bing Za Zhi

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 氮气为惰性气体，常应用于工业中防止物质的氧化、腐蚀和爆炸。在密闭或通风不良的环境中，氮气对人有窒息风险。本文报道1例密闭空间急性氮气中毒病例，该患者在大直径管道内部作业时，连接的氮气输送管道发生意外泄漏，导致其吸入过量氮气而窒息。经积极治疗，患者痊愈。企业应加强职业安全卫生知识培训，提高工人防护意识。工人在密闭空间作业应该严格遵守操作规范，做好安全防护。.
